name: segmentflow-connect
description: Connect your WordPress site or WooCommerce store to Segmentflow for AI-powered email marketing.

scripts.env:classic-checkout: npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update woocommerce_checkout_page_id $(npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp post list --post_type=page --name=classic-checkout --format=ids --quiet) && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update woocommerce_cart_page_id $(npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp post list --post_type=page --name=classic-cart --format=ids --quiet) && echo 'Switched to classic checkout'
scripts.env:blocks-checkout: npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update woocommerce_checkout_page_id $(npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp post list --post_type=page --name=checkout --format=ids --quiet) && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update woocommerce_cart_page_id $(npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp post list --post_type=page --name=cart --format=ids --quiet) && echo 'Switched to Blocks checkout'
